sentences.en: The incrementality test proved that 40% of conversions would have happened without the ad.
sentences.zh: 增量测试证明40%的转化即使没有广告也会发生。

sentences.en: We launched a referral waitlist to build anticipation before the product goes live.
sentences.zh: 我们推出了推荐候补名单，在产品上线前营造期待感。

sentences.en: The geo-targeted campaign in Macau outperformed Hong Kong on a per-dollar basis.
sentences.zh: 澳门的地理定向广告活动在每美元效率上优于香港。

sentences.en: Triggered emails based on user behavior have 3x higher click-through rates than batch sends.
sentences.zh: 基于用户行为触发的邮件比批量发送的邮件点击率高3倍。

sentences.en: The growth team runs a weekly experimentation review to share learnings across squads.
sentences.zh: 增长团队每周进行实验回顾，以跨小组分享经验教训。

example.en: Incrementality testing isolates the true impact of a campaign from organic demand.
example.zh: 增量测试将广告活动的真实影响与自然需求隔离开来。

example.en: The waitlist grew to 50,000 users before the beta launch.
example.zh: 在测试版发布前，候补名单增长到了50,000名用户。

example.en: Geo-targeted ads let us customize messaging for each market.
example.zh: 地理定向广告让我们为每个市场定制信息。

example.en: Triggered notifications are sent when a user completes a specific action.
example.zh: 触发式通知在用户完成特定操作时发送。

example.en: A culture of experimentation allows teams to test ideas quickly and cheaply.
example.zh: 实验文化让团队能快速且低成本地测试想法。

sentences.en: The semantic search upgrade improved query accuracy by 25% over keyword matching.
sentences.zh: 语义搜索升级比关键词匹配提升了25%的查询准确率。

sentences.en: We use progressive disclosure to avoid overwhelming new users with advanced features.
sentences.zh: 我们使用渐进式展示来避免用高级功能让新用户感到压倒。

sentences.en: The SLA guarantees 99.95% uptime for the trading engine.
sentences.zh: SLA保证交易引擎99.95%的可用时间。

sentences.en: We ran a usability test with 8 participants and identified 5 critical pain points.
sentences.zh: 我们用8名参与者做了可用性测试，识别出5个关键痛点。

sentences.en: The dark mode feature request has been the most upvoted item in our feedback portal.
sentences.zh: 深色模式的功能请求是我们反馈平台中投票最多的项目。

example.en: Semantic search understands user intent, not just the literal keywords typed.
example.zh: 语义搜索理解用户意图，而不仅是输入的字面关键词。

example.en: Progressive disclosure shows basic options first and reveals advanced settings on demand.
example.zh: 渐进式展示先显示基本选项，按需展示高级设置。

example.en: Breaching the SLA triggers financial penalties and escalation to management.
example.zh: 违反SLA会触发财务处罚和向管理层的升级。

example.en: Usability testing with real users reveals problems that internal reviews miss.
example.zh: 用真实用户做可用性测试能发现内部评审遗漏的问题。

example.en: The most upvoted feature requests guide our product prioritization.
example.zh: 票数最高的功能请求指导我们的产品优先级排序。

sentences.en: The P/B ratio below 1.0 suggests the stock is trading below its book value.
sentences.zh: 市净率低于1.0表明该股票交易价格低于其账面价值。

sentences.en: The fund manager reduced exposure to high-beta names ahead of the policy meeting.
sentences.zh: 基金经理在政策会议前减少了高贝塔股票的敞口。

sentences.en: The convertible bond offers downside protection with upside participation.
sentences.zh: 可转债提供了下行保护和上行参与的机会。

sentences.en: Same-store sales growth is the most telling metric for retail chain performance.
sentences.zh: 同店销售增长是衡量零售连锁业绩最有说服力的指标。

sentences.en: The trailing twelve-month revenue run rate reached $400 million.
sentences.zh: 过去十二个月的收入年化率达到了4亿美元。

example.en: Book value per share is calculated by dividing total equity by shares outstanding.
example.zh: 每股账面价值通过总权益除以流通股数计算。

example.en: High-beta stocks tend to outperform in bull markets but underperform in downturns.
example.zh: 高贝塔股票在牛市中往往表现优异，但在下跌中表现不佳。

example.en: Convertible bonds can be exchanged for a predetermined number of shares.
example.zh: 可转债可以按预定数量兑换为股票。

example.en: Positive same-store sales growth shows organic demand, not just new store openings.
example.zh: 正向的同店销售增长显示的是有机需求，而不仅是新店开业。

example.en: The current quarterly revenue implies a $500 million annual run rate.
example.zh: 当前季度收入暗示5亿美元的年化收入水平。

sentences.en: The onboarding buddy helps new joiners navigate the organization and build relationships.
sentences.zh: 入职伙伴帮助新员工了解组织并建立人脉关系。

sentences.en: We decompose quarterly OKRs into monthly milestones to maintain accountability.
sentences.zh: 我们将季度OKR分解为月度里程碑以保持责任感。

sentences.en: The meeting-free Wednesday policy gives engineers four hours of uninterrupted focus time.
sentences.zh: 周三无会议政策给工程师提供了四小时不间断的专注时间。

sentences.en: Transparent decision-making builds trust even when people disagree with the outcome.
sentences.zh: 透明的决策过程即使人们不同意结果也能建立信任。

sentences.en: The quarterly town hall is where leadership shares business updates and takes questions live.
sentences.zh: 季度全员大会是管理层分享业务动态并现场回答问题的场合。

example.en: The buddy system pairs every new hire with an experienced colleague for the first month.
example.zh: 伙伴制在第一个月为每位新员工配对一名有经验的同事。

example.en: Decomposing large goals into smaller tasks makes progress measurable.
example.zh: 将大目标分解为小任务使进展可衡量。

example.en: Accountability means owning the result, not just the effort.
example.zh: 责任感意味着对结果负责，而不仅仅是对努力负责。

example.en: Transparent communication reduces rumors and builds organizational trust.
example.zh: 透明沟通减少谣言并建立组织信任。

example.en: The CEO uses the town hall to share the company vision and answer employee questions.
example.zh: CEO利用全员大会分享公司愿景并回答员工问题。

sentences.en: The build-versus-buy analysis favors acquiring the technology rather than developing in-house.
sentences.zh: 自建与购买分析倾向于收购技术而非内部开发。

sentences.en: Customer acquisition cost must decline over time as brand awareness grows.
sentences.zh: 随着品牌知名度提升，获客成本必须随时间下降。

sentences.en: The capital-light model allows us to scale without proportional increases in fixed costs.
sentences.zh: 轻资产模式让我们能在固定成本不等比增加的情况下扩展。

sentences.en: Scenario planning prepares the organization for multiple possible futures simultaneously.
sentences.zh: 情景规划让组织同时为多种可能的未来做好准备。

sentences.en: The acquisition accelerates our entry into the wealth management vertical by two years.
sentences.zh: 这笔收购将我们进入财富管理垂直领域的时间缩短了两年。

example.en: The build-versus-buy decision depends on strategic importance and time-to-market.
example.zh: 自建与购买的决策取决于战略重要性和上市时间。

example.en: Capital-light businesses generate higher returns on invested capital.
example.zh: 轻资产业务在投入资本上产生更高回报。

example.en: Scenario planning uses best-case, base-case, and worst-case projections.
example.zh: 情景规划使用最优、基准和最差三种预测。

example.en: Expanding into adjacent verticals is a proven path to sustained growth.
example.zh: 向邻近垂直领域扩展是实现持续增长的成熟路径。

example.en: Reducing time-to-market gives us a competitive edge in fast-moving sectors.
example.zh: 缩短上市时间在快速变化的行业中给我们竞争优势。
